issues.description: Spurious items not mentioned in step text
Redundant 'cash stack' entries with different rawTokens
Prospector hat mentioned in step but in unresolvedItems, not items[]

notes: questIds accurate - both diaries actively required. items[] all genuinely needed for MLM and Falador diaries. abstractItems present but redundant. Two unresolvedItems (herb tar rock, air staves) appear to be spurious - not in step text. Prospector hat should be resolved to item ID 40,599 (Prospector helmet/hat).
